title: System yeVabatsiri
attention: Chirongwa ichi chevabatsiri hachisi chekutumira "nhengo dzefamiri" kana "vatengi". Ndokumbira verenga {faqLink} usati uramba.
earnPerSale: Wana {amount} kubva pakutengesa kutsva kwega kwega!
earnDescription: Nekuisa rondedzero kuna InterServer pane webhusaiti yako, uchaiwana komisheni ye {amount} pakutengesa kutsva kwega kwega kwatinoita kubva pakodhi yako.

status.title: Status
status.defaultDesc: Mutengi arejistrwa pasi pemubatsiri asi asina kuzadzisa zvinodiwa.
status.pendingDesc: Mutengi azadzisa zvinodiwa zvenguva nebhadharo, uye anomirira kushingirirwa nemutongi.
status.failedDesc: Mutengi haana kuzadzisa zvinodiwa kana mubatsiri akatyora mitemo pakuwana mutengi.
status.paidDesc: Mubatsiri abhadharwa kare kurejistra kwemutengi uyu.

paymentSetup.title: Kugadzira kwekubhadhara
paymentSetup.choosePayment: Sarudza zvaunoda kuitwa nebhadharo yako yemubatsiri
paymentSetup.createPrepay: Gadzira PrePay iine mari yekushandiswa otomatiki painvoice dzangu.

webTrafficPage.title: Web Traffic Yepashure
webTrafficPage.noTraffic: Hapana web traffic yemubatsiri inoenderana nekutsvaga
webTrafficPage.loadInNewTab: Rodha peji mu tab itsva (chenjerai nezvekookie dzinoiswa)
webTrafficPage.viewInNewTab: Ona Peji mu Tab Itsva (chenjerai nezvekookie dzinoiswa)

viewBanners.title: Mabanner
viewBanners.bannerNote: Kuti uzive zvizhinji nezvebanner senge kodhi yeHTML, kukura kwemufananidzo, etc., dzvanya pamufananidzo webanner waunoda kushandisa pawebhusaiti yako.

dockSetup.title: Kugadzira kweDock
dockSetup.couponTooltip: Mutengi mutsva ashandisa kuponi iyi, achatambwa semuratidzirwa nemi uye achanyorwa semutengeso wemubatsiri.
dockSetup.descriptionPlaceholder: Shandisa kuponi iyi paunopa order kuwana mwedzi wekutanga wehosting nemari diki chete.

faqPage.title: FAQ
faqPage.a1: Tinobhadhara komisheni yakaenzana ne$100 pakutengesa, uye ichi ndicho chimwe chezviridzvo zvinobhadhara zvakanyanya.
faqPage.q2: 2. Zinotora nguva yakareba sei kutengesa kuratidzwe muakaundi yangu?
faqPage.a3_step2: Kurudyi kwepasi uchaona sarudzo yeOna Peji reMubatsiri.
faqPage.a3_step3: Pano unogona kuona komisheni dzako dzose dzichimirira uye dzakabvumirwa.
faqPage.q4: 4. Ndinoziva munhu anoda hosting. Ndingawana sei mari yekunyoresa?
faqPage.a4_step2: Skrola kusvika pasi kuti uone rondedzero yako yemubatsiri.
faqPage.a4_step3: Tumira rondedzero iyi kumuzivisa wako anoda hosting.
faqPage.a4_step4: Pavanoenda parondedzero iyo uye vanopedza akaundi nesu, unowana komisheni.
faqPage.q5: 5. Ndabvumidzwa kuchirongwa chevabatsiri cheInterServer Hosting. Ndoita sei zvino?
faqPage.a5_step1: Pinda muakaundi yako yemubatsiri kuti uwane zvinhu zvekumanikidza zeInterServer nekudzvanya tab yeMabanner neRondedzero.
faqPage.a5_step2: Sarudza zvinhu zvekumanikidza zvaunoda kuisa pazvibereko zvako.
faqPage.a5_step3: Uchaona kodhi dzebanner kurudyi kwebanner dzose; kopya upaste kodhi iyi pazvibereko zvako.
faqPage.a5_step4: Munhu akadzvanya parondedzero iyo uye akatenga akaundi yehosting, unowana komisheni.
faqPage.q6: 6. Ndingabvumirwa kutengesa PPC kusimudzira InterServer Hosting?
faqPage.a6_line1: Hongu, asi ndokumbira usatengeseranwe nezita redu rekambani, mavariation ezita, kukanganisa kunyora, kana keyword ipi zvayo inobata chikamu chacho kusanganisira InterServer, InterServer Hosting.
faqPage.a6_line2: Tarira matengeso eeword dzakaita sefast hosting, PHP hosting, WordPress hosting.
faqPage.a6_line3: Ndokumbira tibate kana uchida rubatsiro rwekufunga nezvekeyword.
faqPage.a6_line4: Ita shuwa kuisa InterServer, InterServer Hosting, InterServer.net, InterServer web hosting semazwi ekutengesa anopesana.
faqPage.a7_line1: Mazuva 90 apfuura kutengesa kwakakodzera kuchachinja kubva kuStatus yakajairwa kuya ichimirira.
faqPage.a7_line2: Kutengesa kwakatova kwaIchimirira kuchabhara mukati memazuva 7 ekutanga emwedzi.
faqPage.a8_line1: Zvinogona kuva nezvimwe zvikonzero. Dzimwe nguva tinoda nguva yakawanda kusimbisa kutengesa.
faqPage.a8_line2: Chinhu chakapfava kuchecka ndechinosimbisa kuti nzira yako yekubhadhara yaisiwa.
faqPage.q9: 9. Kutengesa/komisheni yangu inoramha ichimirira nguva yakareba sei isati yabvumirwa?
faqPage.q10: 10. Ndinogona kushandisa rondedzero yangu yemubatsiri kuzvinyoresa paakaundi dzandichashandisa zviri zvandiri?
faqPage.a10: Aiwa. Kubatana kwese neakaundi yakatengeswa zvinozoreva kutadza otomatiki kwekutengesa.
faqPage.a11_intro: Kurambwa kunoreva kuti komisheni yakashaya zvachose.
faqPage.a11_reason2: Nzira imwe yekubhadhara yakashandiswa neakaundi imwe.
faqPage.a11_reason3: System yakaona kuti iwe, mubatsiri, uchishandisawo akaundi yemutengi.
faqPage.a11_policy: Sezvo kubhadhara kwedu kwe$100 pakutengesa kuri kwakanyanya kupfuura zvatinodzoreredza kubva kumutengi kunyange mushure memakore 1, tine mitemo yakasimba yekubata kutumira kunopesana nematananguro edu. Kana uchiratidza shamwari kana mutengi, vape rondedzero kana kuponi chete. Usagovana mhando dzekubhadhara uye usashandisa akaundi.
faqPage.a11_reviewTos: Zvakare ndokumbira ona mitemo yedu yemubatsiri pano:
faqPage.q12: 12. Ndiri mugadziri/mudevelopa uye ndichatumira vatengi. Ichokwadi here?
faqPage.a12_line1: Chirongwa ichi hachishande nesu (kana chirongwa chechimwe chehosting affiliate). Kana mapatanisirwa awanike muakaundi dzakawanda, komisheni dzinoshaya.
faqPage.a12_line2: Izvi zvinoitiwa kuzvidzivirira munhu mumwe wega kubva pakurejistra uye kuwana mari kubva pachitunha chedu chevabatsiri nekuzvitumira.
faqPage.a12_line3: Ungazvifunga kuti uhost vatengi zvakananga uye uvabhadharire nemari nesimbi yakadai sePayPal. Unogona kutenga akaundi yereseller hosting kubva kwatiri uye utange.
